response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience across web, mobile, and some embedded-adjacent work, but lacks the core requirements for this role. There is no evidence of native Japanese proficiency, no demonstrated C programming for UNIX/embedded systems in recent roles, no Linux kernel modification experience, and no exposure to networking security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP) or LAN-switch firmware development.
strengths: Broad polyglot experience across multiple stacks and domains
Some low-level/embedded exposure (NI LabWindows/CVI in C/C++, wave field synthesis on Linux)
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, testing)
concerns: No indication of Japanese language proficiency (hard requirement)
No Linux kernel source-code modification experience
No networking security or LAN-switch firmware experience (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP)

key_factors.factor: No embedded networking / switch security background
